_comment: Model scatter (the Loom): deterministic per-cell GLB props that auto-dress the world by biome, the way flora species do — so a generated world grows its own rocks/cacti/shrubs/trees without hand-placing. Category-based: each group draws from ALL non-gated Cards slots in its category (full-treatment density, no per-slot upkeep — new card slots join automatically). `attempts` = candidate points per 128m cell; each is accepted with probability biomes[biome-under-it] (times the cell's biome density), so deserts stay sparse and oases teem. Presentation only: rebuilt from the cell hash at stream time, never saved, never in the soak. Tune attempts to taste — density is the point.
